creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Created attachment 242917
format-patch for converters/ytnef 2.1.2

Changes (https://github.com/Yeraze/ytnef/compare/v2.1.1...v2.1.2):
- Increase filename limit to 260 bytes (was 100)

QA:
- portlint and portclippy are happy.
- poudriere testport:
    13.2-amd64: ok
    13.2-arm64: ok
    12.4-amd64: ok
    12.4-i386: ok

Maintainer:
This port has not had a maintainer since 2014. It has received some TLC
since then, but my picking it up from the pool should increase the
likelihood of it staying up to date.
